module_info.docstring:
Model metadata, context lengths, and token estimation utilities.

Pure utility functions with no AIAgent dependency. Used by ContextCompressor
and run_agent.py for pre-flight context checks.

functions.name: fetch_model_metadata
functions.docstring: Fetch model metadata from OpenRouter (cached for 1 hour).

functions.name: get_model_context_length
functions.docstring: Get the context length for a model (API first, then fallback defaults).

functions.name: estimate_tokens_rough
functions.docstring: Rough token estimate (~4 chars/token) for pre-flight checks.

functions.name: estimate_messages_tokens_rough
functions.docstring: Rough token estimate for a message list (pre-flight only).
